title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: This is a news roundup covering multiple AI releases including OmniShotCut for video editing, Happy Horse robot girlfriend application, Mocap Anything v2 for motion capture, open models like Ling2.6 Flash and SenseNova U1, and updates to Grok 4.3 and Mistral 3.5. The video catalogs recent AI tools spanning video generation, animation, agent systems, and multimodal models.
